questions.question: If 'A - B' means 'A is the brother of B', 'A + B' means 'A is the sister of B', 'A * B' means 'A is the father of B', 'A ÷ B' means 'A is the mother of B', then which of the following options signifies that P is the grandmother of Q? > यदि 'A - B' का अर्थ है 'A, B का भाई है', 'A + B' का अर्थ है 'A, B की बहन है', 'A * B' का अर्थ है 'A, B का पिता है', 'A ÷ B' का अर्थ है 'A, B की माता है', तो निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा विकल्प दर्शाता है कि P, Q की दादी है?
questions.explanation: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699705818fbda9.07599688.gif) → Male - → Female -- → Siblings = → Couple ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970581abd315.79538815.png) So, P is the mother of Q’s Father i.e. P is grandmother of Q. > + → पुरुष - → महिला -- → भाई-बहन = → युगल ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970581bc3889.71655344.png) तो, P, Q के पिता की माँ है यानी P, Q की दादी है।

questions.question: In a certain code language, ‘NABH' is coded as ‘83’. How will ‘NISHANT’ be coded in the same language?
questions.explanation: The pattern followed here is the addition of the ranking of opposite of given alphabets. N-OPPOSITE-M-13, A-OPPOSITE-Z-26, B-OPPOSITE-Y-25 AND H-OPPOSITE-S-19, so 13+26+25+19=83 SIMILARLY, NISHANT=13+18+8+19+26+ 13+ 7=104

questions.question: PZAK is related to KAZP following a certain logic. Following the same logic, LAMP is related to OZNK. To which of the following is AZCD related, following the same logic?
questions.explanation: P → opposite → K Z → A A → Z K → P L → O A→ Z M → N P → K Similarly A → Z Z → A C → X D → W Then ZAXW i.e Option C will be the correct answer.

questions.explanation: The pattern is alternate of square and cube. 4→ 22, 27=33, 16= 42, 125= 53 Next should be the square of 6 = 36 > यह पैटर्न वर्ग और घन का एकांतर है। 4→ 22, 27=33, 16= 42, 125= 53 अगला 6 का वर्ग = 36 होना चाहिए

questions.question: Three statements are given followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follows from the statements. Statements: All parrots are crows. All birds are crows. All crows are eagles. Conclusions: I. No crow is a bird. II. Some birds are eagles. III. All crows are birds > तीन कथनों के बाद तीन निष्कर्ष I, II और III दिए गए हैं। कथनों को सत्य मानते हुए, भले ही वे आम तौर पर ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न प्रतीत होते हों, तय करें कि कौन सा निष्कर्ष कथनों का तार्किक रूप से अनुसरण करता है। कथन: सभी तोते कौवे हैं। सभी पक्षी कौवे हैं। सभी कौवे चील हैं। निष्कर्ष: I. कोई कौवा पक्षी नहीं है। II. कुछ पक्षी चील हैं। III. सभी कौवे पक्षी हैं
options: Only conclusion II follows>केवल निष्कर्ष II अनुसरण करता है
Only conclusion III follows>केवल निष्कर्ष III अनुसरण करता है
Both conclusions II and III follows >दोनों निष्कर्ष II और III अनुसरण करते हैं
All conclusions follows>सभी निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करते हैं
questions.explanation: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699705853e9418.51626633.png) Only conclusion II follows, hence option A is correct. > ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699705854e1194.93650042.png) केवल निष्कर्ष II अनुसरण करता है, अतः विकल्प A सही है।

questions.question: Eight persons P, Q, R, S, T, U, V and W are sitting around a circular table facing the centre [not necessarily in the same order]. Two persons sit between Q and W. V sits immediate left of W. Three persons sit between S and T. R sits immediate left of T. U is not the neighbour of P. One person sits between P and Q. Which of the following statement is correct? > आठ व्यक्ति P, Q, R, S, T, U, V और W एक गोलाकार मेज़ के चारों ओर केंद्र की ओर मुंह करके बैठे हैं [जरूरी नहीं कि इसी क्रम में हों]। Q और W के बीच दो व्यक्ति बैठे हैं। V, W के ठीक बाएं बैठा है। S और T के बीच तीन व्यक्ति बैठे हैं। R, T के ठीक बाएं बैठा है। U, P का पड़ोसी नहीं है। P और Q के बीच एक व्यक्ति बैठा है। निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा कथन सही है?
options: Q sits to the immediate right of U.>Q, U के ठीक दाईं ओर बैठा है।
Three persons sit between Q and R>Q और R के बीच तीन व्यक्ति बैठे हैं।
One person sits between P and R >P और R के बीच एक व्यक्ति बैठा है।
One person sits between S and U>S और U के बीच एक व्यक्ति बैठा है।
questions.explanation: The correct sitting order will be as follows: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699705860fe835.05530576.png) So, one person sits between S and U. > बैठने का सही क्रम इस प्रकार होगा: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970586206bc2.51408099.png) अतः S और U के बीच एक व्यक्ति बैठा है।

questions.question: The Global Hunger Index 2024 is published by which organization, where India got 105th place out of 127 countries? > ग्लोबल हंगर इंडेक्स 2024 किस संगठन द्वारा प्रकाशित किया गया, जहाँ भारत 127 देशों में 105वें स्थान पर रहा?
options: Concern Worldwide & Welt hungerhilfe>कंसर्न वर्ल्डवाइड और वेल्ट हंगरहिल्फ
United Nations Development Programme [UNDP] >संयुक्त राष्ट्र विकास कार्यक्रम
Food and Agriculture Organization [FAO]>खाद्य और कृषि संगठन [FAO]
questions.explanation: The Global Hunger Index [GHI] is an annual report that tracks hunger levels worldwide. It is jointly published by Concern Worldwide [an Irish humanitarian organization] and Welt hungerhilfe [a German aid organization]. The 2024 report highlights India's serious hunger crisis, ranking 105th out of 127 countries. The top country with the best performance in the Global Hunger Index 2024 is Somalia, which has the lowest hunger levels. > ग्लोबल हंगर इंडेक्स [GHI] एक वार्षिक रिपोर्ट है जो दुनिया भर में भूख के स्तर पर नज़र रखती है। इसे कंसर्न वर्ल्डवाइड [एक आयरिश मानवीय संगठन] और वेल्ट हंगरहिल्फ़ [एक जर्मन सहायता संगठन] द्वारा संयुक्त रूप से प्रकाशित किया जाता है। 2024 की रिपोर्ट में भारत के गंभीर भूख संकट पर प्रकाश डाला गया है, जो 127 देशों में से 105वें स्थान पर है। ग्लोबल हंगर इंडेक्स 2024 में सर्वश्रेष्ठ प्रदर्शन करने वाला शीर्ष देश सोमालिया है, जिसमें भूख का स्तर सबसे कम है।

questions.question: Which of the following famous personality established the Indian National Associations in 1876?
questions.explanation: The Indian National Association was established in 1876 by Surendranath Banerjee, a prominent nationalist leader. It was one of the earliest organizations to voice Indian concerns and demand political reforms during British rule. He played a crucial role in India's struggle for self-governance and later became a key leader in the Indian National Congress as well.

questions.question: Which element is known as the 'King of Chemicals'? > कौन सा तत्व 'रसायनों का राजा' के रूप में जाना जाता है?
questions.explanation: Sulfur is often referred to as the "King of Chemicals" because of its extensive use in various industrial applications, particularly in the production of sulfuric acid, which is one of the most important chemicals in manufacturing, fertilizers, and petroleum refining. > सल्फर को अक्सर "रसायनों का राजा" कहा जाता है, क्योंकि इसका उपयोग विभिन्न औद्योगिक अनुप्रयोगों में व्यापक रूप से किया जाता है, विशेष रूप से सल्फ्यूरिक एसिड के उत्पादन में, जो विनिर्माण, उर्वरक और पेट्रोलियम शोधन में सबसे महत्वपूर्ण रसायनों में से एक है।

questions.question: Justice Verma Committee [2013] made recommendations on which of the given topics after the 2012 Delhi gang rape case? > न्यायमूर्ति वर्मा समिति [2013] ने 2012 दिल्ली गैंग रेप मामले के बाद दिए गए विषयों में से किस पर सिफारिशें दी थीं?
options: Crimes Against Women>महिलाओं के खिलाफ अपराध
Sexual Harassment at Workplace >कार्यस्थल पर यौन उत्पीड़न
questions.explanation: The Justice Verma Committee focused on legal and institutional reforms to improve women's safety and justice mechanisms after the tragic incident. It recommended stricter laws on sexual offenses, police accountability, gender sensitization, and criminalizing marital rape, which led to major legal changes, including the Criminal Law [Amendment] Act, 2013. > जस्टिस वर्मा समिति ने महिलाओं की सुरक्षा और न्याय प्रणाली में सुधार लाने के लिए कानूनी और संस्थागत सुधारों पर ध्यान केंद्रित किया। इस समिति ने यौन अपराधों पर सख्त कानून, पुलिस की जवाबदेही, लैंगिक संवेदनशीलता, और वैवाहिक बलात्कार को अपराध घोषित करने जैसी अनुशंसाएँ कीं, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप आपराधिक कानून [संशोधन] अधिनियम, 2013 सहित कई महत्वपूर्ण कानूनी बदलाव किए गए।

questions.question: The famous Ramappa Temple is located in which of the Indian State? > प्रसिद्ध रामप्पा मंदिर भारत के किस राज्य में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The Ramappa Temple, also known as the Rudreshwara Temple, is located in Palampet village, Mulugu district, Telangana, India. It was built in 1213 CE during the Kakatiya dynasty and is famous for its intricate carvings and floating bricks. In July 2021, it was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. > रामप्पा मंदिर , जिसे रुद्रेश्वर मंदिर भी कहा जाता है, पलमपेट गाँव, मुलुगु जिला, तेलंगाना, भारत में स्थित है। यह 1213 ईस्वी में काकतीय वंश के दौरान बनाया गया था और अपनी जटिल नक्काशी तथा तैरते हुए ईंटों के लिए प्रसिद्ध है। जुलाई 2021 में इसे यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल घोषित किया गया।

questions.question: The 97th Amendment Act of the Indian Constitution, passed in 2011, provides constitutional recognition and protection to what? > भारतीय संविधान का 97वां संशोधन अधिनियम, जो 2011 में पारित हुआ, किसको संवैधानिक मान्यता और संरक्षण प्रदान करता है?
questions.explanation: The 97th Amendment Act, 2011 granted constitutional status and protection to cooperative societies in India. It introduced Article 19[1] [c], making the right to form cooperative societies a fundamental right, and added Article 43B as a Directive Principle of State Policy, emphasizing the state's role in promoting cooperatives. Additionally, it incorporated Part IX-B [Articles 243-ZH to 243-ZT] to regulate the functioning of cooperative societies. > 97वें संशोधन अधिनियम, 2011 ने भारत में सहकारी समितियों को संवैधानिक दर्जा और संरक्षण प्रदान किया। इसने अनुच्छेद 19[1] [सी] पेश किया, जिससे सहकारी समितियों के गठन का अधिकार एक मौलिक अधिकार बन गया, और अनुच्छेद 43बी को राज्य नीति के निर्देशक सिद्धांत के रूप में जोड़ा गया, जिसमें सहकारी समितियों को बढ़ावा देने में राज्य की भूमिका पर जोर दिया गया। इसके अतिरिक्त, इसने सहकारी समितियों के कामकाज को विनियमित करने के लिए भाग IX-B [अनुच्छेद 243-ZH से 243-ZT] को शामिल किया।

questions.question: Vijayawada is located on the bank of which river? > विजयवाड़ा किस नदी के किनारे स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Vijayawada is situated on the banks of the Krishna River. Vijayawada is also a major commercial hub in Andhra Pradesh, known for its education, trade, and transport connectivity. > विजयवाड़ा कृष्णा नदी के किनारे स्थित है। विजयवाड़ा आंध्र प्रदेश का एक प्रमुख वाणिज्यिक केंद्र है, जो शिक्षा, व्यापार और परिवहन संपर्क के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।

questions.question: In which year the Theosophical Society was established in Adyar, Madras? > थियोसोफिकल सोसाइटी की स्थापना अड्यार, मद्रास में किस वर्ष हुई थी?
questions.explanation: The Theosophical Society was established in Adyar, Madras [now Chennai] in the year 1882. Originally founded in 1875 in New York by Madame Blavatsky and Colonel Henry Steel Olcott, the society moved its headquarters to Adyar in 1882, where it became an influential center for spiritual and philosophical teachings in India. Annie Besent joined the Theosophical Society in 1889 and became deeply involved in its activities. In 1907, she became the second International President of the society after the death of Colonel Henry Steel Olcott. In 1916, she co-founded the All-India Home Rule League with Bal Gangadhar Tilak, pushing for self-governance. In 1917, she became the first woman President of the Indian National Congress, marking a historic moment in India's political landscape. > थियोसोफिकल सोसाइटी की स्थापना 1882 में अडयार, मद्रास [अब चेन्नई] में हुई थी। मूल रूप से इसे 1875 में न्यूयॉर्क में मैडम ब्लावात्स्की और कर्नल हेनरी स्टील ओल्कॉट द्वारा स्थापित किया गया था। 1882 में इसका मुख्यालय अडयार स्थानांतरित हुआ, जहाँ यह भारत में आध्यात्मिक और दार्शनिक शिक्षाओं का प्रभावशाली केंद्र बन गया। एनी बेसेंट ने 1889 में थियोसोफिकल सोसाइटी में प्रवेश किया और इसकी गतिविधियों में गहन रूप से शामिल हुईं। 1907 में, कर्नल हेनरी स्टील ओल्कॉट के निधन के बाद, वह इस सोसाइटी की दूसरी अंतर्राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष बनीं। 1916 में, उन्होंने बाल गंगाधर तिलक के साथ ऑल-इंडिया होम रूल लीग की सह-स्थापना की, जो स्वशासन की माँग को आगे बढ़ाने का एक महत्वपूर्ण प्रयास था। 1917 में, वह भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस की पहली महिला अध्यक्ष बनीं, जो भारत की राजनीतिक परिदृश्य में एक ऐतिहासिक क्षण था।

questions.question: Which of the following option best express the answer about Maharashtra’s Nuclear Power Plants? > महाराष्ट्र के परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्रों के बारे में सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा है?
options: Tarapur Atomic Power Station>तारापुर परमाणु ऊर्जा स्टेशन
Borivali Nuclear Power Plant>बोरिवली परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र
Jaitapur Nuclear Power Plant >जैतापुर परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र
Both A and C>दोनों A और C
questions.explanation: Maharashtra has two significant nuclear power plants: Tarapur Atomic Power Station – India's first commercial nuclear power station, located in Palghar district. It has four reactors and is operated by the Nuclear Power Corporation of India Ltd [NPCIL]. Jaitapur Nuclear Power Plant – A proposed mega nuclear power project in Ratnagiri district, expected to be the world’s largest nuclear power plant with six reactors of 1,650 MW each, developed in collaboration with France. > महाराष्ट्र में दो महत्वपूर्ण परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र हैं: तारापुर परमाणु ऊर्जा स्टेशन - पालघर जिले में स्थित भारत का पहला वाणिज्यिक परमाणु ऊर्जा स्टेशन। इसमें चार रिएक्टर हैं और इसका संचालन न्यूक्लियर पावर कॉरपोरेशन ऑफ इंडिया लिमिटेड [एनपीसीआईएल] द्वारा किया जाता है। जैतापुर परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र - रत्नागिरी जिले में प्रस्तावित मेगा परमाणु ऊर्जा परियोजना, फ्रांस के सहयोग से विकसित 1,650 मेगावाट के छह रिएक्टरों के साथ दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा परमाणु ऊर्जा संयंत्र होने की उम्मीद है।

questions.question: Who is considered the architect of the Second Five-Year Plan in India? > भारत के द्वितीय पंचवर्षीय योजना के वास्तुकार किसे माना जाता है?
questions.explanation: P.C. Mahalanobis is considered the architect of the Second Five-Year Plan in India, as he introduced the Mahalanobis model, which emphasized industrialization and the development of heavy industries. His approach played a crucial role in shaping India's economic planning. > पी.सी. महालनोबिस भारत के द्वितीय पंचवर्षीय योजना के सूत्रधार के रूप में माना जाता है, क्योंकि उन्होंने महालनोबिस मॉडल प्रस्तुत किया, जिसने औद्योगिकीकरण और भारी उद्योगों के विकास पर जोर दिया। उनकी इस पद्धति ने भारत की आर्थिक योजना को आकार देने में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाई।

questions.question: Jawahar tunnel is located in which of the following pass? > जवाहर सुरंग निम्नलिखित में से किस दर्रे में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: The Jawahar Tunnel, also known as the Banihal Tunnel, is located below the Banihal Pass in the Pir Panjal mountain range in Jammu and Kashmir, India. It provides year-round connectivity between Jammu and Srinagar. > जवाहर सुरंग, जिसे बनिहाल सुरंग भी कहा जाता है, जम्मू और कश्मीर, भारत में पिर पंजाल पर्वत श्रृंखला के बनिहाल दर्रे के नीचे स्थित है। यह जम्मू और श्रीनगर के बीच सालभर निर्बाध संपर्क प्रदान करती है।

questions.question: Seychelles is an archipelago famous for its pristine beaches and nature reserves located in which ocean? > सेशेल्स एक द्वीप समूह है, जो अपनी सुंदर समुद्र तटों और प्राकृतिक संरक्षणों के लिए प्रसिद्ध है। यह किस महासागर में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Seychelles is an island nation located in the Indian Ocean, off the eastern coast of Africa. It is well-known for its breath-taking beaches, rich marine biodiversity, and stunning nature reserves. It really is a true tropical paradise. > सेशेल्स हिंद महासागर में, अफ्रीका के पूर्वी तट के पास स्थित एक द्वीपीय देश है। यह अपनी अद्भुत समुद्री तटों, समृद्ध समुद्री जैव विविधता, और मनमोहक प्राकृतिक अभ्यारण्यों के लिए प्रसिद्ध है। यह वास्तव में एक सच्चा उष्णकटिबंधीय स्वर्ग है।

questions.question: Mt. Cotopaxi is an active strato volcano is situated in which of the Country? > माउंट कोटोपैक्सी एक सक्रिय स्ट्रैटोवोल्केनो है, जो किस देश में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Cotopaxi is an active stratovolcano located in the Andes Mountains of Ecuador. Standing at 5,897 meters [19,347 feet], it is one of the world's highest active volcanoes. It has a stunning symmetrical cone shape and is covered with equatorial glaciers, making it a popular destination for climbers and nature lovers. > कोटोपैक्सी एक सक्रिय स्ट्रेटोवोलकैनो है जो इक्वाडोर के एंडीज पर्वत में स्थित है। 5,897 मीटर [19,347 फीट] की ऊंचाई पर स्थित, यह दुनिया के सबसे ऊंचे सक्रिय ज्वालामुखियों में से एक है। इसका आकार आश्चर्यजनक सममित शंकु जैसा है और यह भूमध्यरेखीय ग्लेशियरों से ढका हुआ है, जो इसे पर्वतारोहियों और प्रकृति प्रेमियों के लिए एक लोकप्रिय गंतव्य बनाता है।

questions.question: Tiger Triumph – A tri-service humanitarian assistance and disaster relief exercise, its 4th edition [2025] held between?
options: India and the Maldives>भारत और मालदीव
India and the United States>भारत और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका
questions.explanation: Tiger Triumph is a tri-service military exercise involving the Indian Army, Navy, and Air Force, alongside their U.S. counterparts. It focuses on humanitarian assistance and disaster relief operations, ensuring better coordination between the two nations during emergencies like natural disasters or crises. > टाइगर ट्रायम्फ एक त्रि-सेवा सैन्य अभ्यास है, जिसमें भारतीय सेना, नौसेना और वायुसेना अपने अमेरिकी समकक्षों के साथ भाग लेती हैं। इस अभ्यास का मुख्य उद्देश्य मानवीय सहायता और आपदा राहत अभियानों पर केंद्रित होता है, जिससे प्राकृतिक आपदाओं या संकट के समय दोनों देशों के बीच बेहतर समन्वय सुनिश्चित किया जा सके।

questions.question: The Greenhouse Gases Emissions Intensity [GEI] Target Rules, 2025 was notified by which Ministry? > ग्रीनहाउस गैस उत्सर्जन तीव्रता [GEI] लक्ष्य नियम, 2025 किस मंत्रालय द्वारा अधिसूचित किए गए थे?
options: Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas>पेट्रोलियम एवं प्राकृतिक गैस मंत्रालय
Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare >कृषि एवं किसान कल्याण मंत्रालय
Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change>पर्यावरण, वन और जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय
questions.explanation: The Greenhouse Gases Emissions Intensity [GEI] Target Rules, 2025 was notified by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change on April 16, 2025. The Rules establish a compliance mechanism for the Carbon Credit Trading Scheme [CCTS], which supports India’s commitments under the Paris Climate Agreement. > ग्रीनहाउस गैस उत्सर्जन तीव्रता [GEI] लक्ष्य नियम, 2025 को पर्यावरण, वन और जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय द्वारा 16 अप्रैल, 2025 को अधिसूचित किया गया था। ये नियम कार्बन क्रेडिट ट्रेडिंग योजना [CCTS] के लिए एक अनुपालन तंत्र स्थापित करते हैं, जो पेरिस जलवायु समझौते के तहत भारत की प्रतिबद्धताओं का समर्थन करता है।

questions.question: What does 'marginal utility' refers to in economics? > अर्थशास्त्र में 'सीमान्त उपयोगिता' किसे संदर्भित करता है?
options: The total satisfaction from consuming a good>किसी वस्तु के उपभोग से प्राप्त कुल संतोष
The additional satisfaction from consuming one more unit of a good>किसी वस्तु की एक अतिरिक्त इकाई का उपभोग करने से प्राप्त अतिरिक्त संतोष
The decrease in satisfaction from consuming a good >किसी वस्तु के उपभोग से संतोष में कमी
The cost of producing one more unit of a good>किसी वस्तु की एक अतिरिक्त इकाई का उत्पादन करने की लागत
questions.explanation: Marginal utility refers to the extra benefit or satisfaction that a consumer gains from consuming one additional unit of a good or service. It plays a key role in understanding consumer choices and demand patterns in economics. Here is an everyday example: Eating food: The first slice of pizza is incredibly satisfying when you're hungry. The second is still enjoyable, but by the time you reach the third or fourth slice, the pleasure starts to decrease—this is diminishing marginal utility in action. > सीमांत उपयोगिता वह अतिरिक्त लाभ या संतोष को दर्शाता है जो उपभोक्ता किसी वस्तु या सेवा की एक और इकाई का उपभोग करने से प्राप्त करता है। यह अर्थशास्त्र में उपभोक्ता विकल्पों और मांग के पैटर्न को समझने में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाता है। एक रोजमर्रा का उदाहरण: खाने की बात करें—जब आप भूखे होते हैं, तो पहला पिज़्ज़ा स्लाइस अत्यधिक संतोषजनक लगता है। दूसरा भी मज़ेदार होता है, लेकिन जैसे ही आप तीसरे या चौथे स्लाइस तक पहुँचते हैं, संतोष की भावना कम होने लगती है—इसी को घटती सीमांत उपयोगिता कहा जाता है।

questions.question: Jelly fish, Coral and Hydra are belongs to which of the following Phylum? > जेलीफ़िश, प्रवाल और हाइड्रा निम्नलिखित में से किस संघ से संबंधित हैं?
questions.explanation: Cnidarians or Coelenterate is aquatic invertebrates characterized by their radial symmetry, stinging cells [cnidocytes], and simple body structure. They include jellyfish, corals, hydra, and sea anemones. Some species exist as free-swimming medusa [like jellyfish], while others are sessile polyps [like corals and hydra]. >निडारियन या कोएलेंटरेट जलीय अकशेरुकी हैं जिनकी विशेषता उनकी रेडियल समरूपता, डंक मारने वाली कोशिकाएँ [सीनिडोसाइट्स] और सरल शारीरिक संरचना है। इनमें जेलीफ़िश, कोरल, हाइड्रा और समुद्री एनीमोन शामिल हैं। कुछ प्रजातियाँ मुक्त-तैराकी मेडुसा [जेलीफ़िश की तरह] के रूप में मौजूद हैं, जबकि अन्य स्थिर पॉलीप्स हैं [कोरल और हाइड्रा की तरह]।

questions.question: Which vitamin helps in the absorption of iron from food? > कौन सा विटामिन भोजन से आयरन के अवशोषण में सहायता करता है?
questions.explanation: Vitamin C enhances iron absorption by converting it into a form that is more easily absorbed by the body. This is especially important for non-heme iron, which comes from plant-based sources like spinach, lentils, and beans. So, pairing iron-rich foods with citrus fruits, bell peppers, or other vitamin C sources can boost iron levels naturally. > विटामिन C शरीर में लोहे के अवशोषण को बढ़ाने में मदद करता है, खासकर गैर-हीम आयरन के मामले में, जो पौधों आधारित स्रोतों से आता है, जैसे पालक, दाल और बीन्स। यदि आप आयरन युक्त भोजन को सिट्रस फलों, शिमला मिर्च या अन्य विटामिन C स्रोतों के साथ मिलाकर खाते हैं, तो यह शरीर में आयरन स्तर को स्वाभाविक रूप से बढ़ाने में मदद कर सकता है।

questions.question: What is the common thing in both Buddhism and Jainism in the given options? > बौद्ध धर्म और जैन धर्म में निम्नलिखित विकल्पों में से कौन सी समान बात है?
questions.explanation: In Buddhism, the Three Jewels [Triratna] include Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha. In Jainism, the Three Jewels [Ratnatraya] consist of Right Faith [Samyak Darshana], Right Knowledge [Samyak Jnana], and Right Conduct [Samyak Charitra]. The other options—Three Pitaka, Eightfold Path, and Four Noble Truths—are specific only to Buddhism and not Jainism. > बौद्ध धर्म में, तीन रत्न [त्रिरत्न] में बुद्ध, धर्म और संघ शामिल हैं। जैन धर्म में, तीन रत्न [रत्नत्रय] में सही विश्वास [सम्यक दर्शन], सही ज्ञान [सम्यक ज्ञान] और सही आचरण [सम्यक चरित्र] शामिल हैं। अन्य विकल्प- तीन पिटक, अष्टांगिक मार्ग और चार आर्य सत्य- केवल बौद्ध धर्म के लिए विशिष्ट हैं, जैन धर्म के लिए नहीं।

questions.question: Who is a 55-year-old Nepali mountaineer, recently made headlines by breaking his own record for the most ascents of Mount Everest? > हाल ही में अपनी ही रिकॉर्ड तोड़कर सबसे अधिक बार माउंट एवरेस्ट पर चढ़ाई करने वाले 55 वर्षीय नेपाली पर्वतारोही कौन हैं?
questions.explanation: The legendary Nepali mountaineer Kami Rita Sherpa, recently made history by climbing Mount Everest for the 31st time, breaking his own record. Known as the "Everest Man," he first summited the world's highest peak in 1994 and has continued to do so nearly every year since. > महान नेपाली पर्वतारोही कामी रीता शेर्पा ने हाल ही में इतिहास रच दिया है, जब उन्होंने 31वीं बार माउंट एवरेस्ट पर चढ़ाई कर अपने ही रिकॉर्ड को तोड़ दिया। "एवरेस्ट मैन" के नाम से प्रसिद्ध, उन्होंने पहली बार 1994 में विश्व की सबसे ऊँची चोटी पर कदम रखा और तब से लगभग हर साल इस उपलब्धि को दोहराते रहे हैं।

questions.question: What is formed when an acid reacts with a base?
questions.explanation: When an acid reacts with a base, a neutralization reaction occurs, forming salt and water as the primary products. This reaction can be represented as: Acid + Base → Salt + Water For example, the reaction between hydrochloric acid (HCl) and sodium hydroxide (NaOH): HCl + NaOH → NaCl + H₂O This process is essential in chemistry, particularly in controlling pH levels in various applications.

questions.question: Which law states that the angle of incidence is equal to the angle of reflection? > वह नियम जो यह बताता है कि आपतन कोण प्रतिबिंब कोण के बराबर होता है?
questions.explanation: This law states that the angle of incidence [the angle at which light strikes a surface] is always equal to the angle of reflection [the angle at which light bounces off the surface]. This principle is fundamental in understanding how mirrors work and how light interacts with reflective surfaces. Whereas, Snell's Law describes the relationship between the angles of incidence and refraction when light passes from one medium to another. It is given by the equation: n1sinθ1=n2sinθ2 where: 𝑛1 and 𝑛2 are the refractive indices of the two media, 𝜃1 is the angle of incidence, 𝜃2 is the angle of refraction. This law helps explain how light bends when it moves through different materials, like air to water or glass. It plays a crucial role in optics and is used in designing lenses and optical instruments. > परावर्तन का नियम कहता है कि आपतन कोण [जिस कोण पर प्रकाश किसी सतह पर गिरता है] हमेशा परावर्तन कोण [जिस कोण पर प्रकाश सतह से वापस आता है] के बराबर होता है। यह सिद्धांत दर्पणों के कार्य करने और प्रकाश के परावर्तक सतहों के साथ संपर्क को समझने में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाता है। जबकि स्नेल का नियम अपवर्तन कोण और आपतन कोण के बीच संबंध को दर्शाता है जब प्रकाश एक माध्यम से दूसरे माध्यम में प्रवेश करता है। इसे निम्नलिखित समीकरण द्वारा व्यक्त किया जाता है: n1sinθ1=n2sinθ2 जहाँ: n₁ और n₂ क्रमशः दोनों माध्यमों के अपवर्तनांक हैं। θ₁ आपतन कोण है। θ₂ अपवर्तन कोण है। यह नियम प्रकाश की वक्रता को समझने में मदद करता है, जैसे हवा से पानी या कांच में प्रवेश करते समय। यह ऑप्टिक्स में बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है और लेंस एवं अन्य प्रकाशीय उपकरणों को डिजाइन करने में उपयोग किया जाता है।

questions.question: Yoga is added as 11th UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage in which year? > योग को 11वें यूनेस्को अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत के रूप में किस वर्ष जोड़ा गया था?
questions.explanation: Yoga was added to UNESCO's Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in the year 2016. This recognition highlights Yoga's cultural significance, its role in promoting mental, physical, and spiritual well-being, and its global impact. India's first entry into UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list was in 2008, when three elements were inscribed: Kutiyattam, Sanskrit Theatre [Kerala] Tradition of Vedic Chanting [Across India] Ramlila, the Traditional Performance of the Ramayana [Mainly North India]. > वर्ष 2016 में यूनेस्को की मानवता की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत की प्रतिनिधि सूची में योग को शामिल किया गया। यह मान्यता योग के सांस्कृतिक महत्व, मानसिक, शारीरिक और आध्यात्मिक कल्याण को बढ़ावा देने में इसकी भूमिका और इसके वैश्विक प्रभाव पर प्रकाश डालती है। भारत का यूनेस्को की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत सूची में पहला प्रवेश 2008 में हुआ था, जब तीन तत्वों को अंकित किया गया था: कुटियाट्टम, संस्कृत रंगमंच [केरल] वैदिक मंत्रोच्चार की परंपरा [पूरे भारत में] रामलीला, रामायण का पारंपरिक प्रदर्शन [मुख्य रूप से उत्तर भारत]।

questions.question: Which of the following ruler started the practice of Sijda and Paibos in court? > निम्नलिखित में से किस शासक ने दरबार में सिजदा और पैबोस की प्रथा शुरू की?
questions.explanation: The practice of Sijda [prostration] and Paibos [kissing the emperor's feet] was introduced by Ghiyasuddin Balban, the Sultan of Delhi from the Mamluk Dynasty. He emphasized absolute monarchy and introduced rigid court etiquette to strengthen the authority of the Sultan. > सिजदा [नमन] और पैबोस [सम्राट के चरण चूमना] की प्रथा को दिल्ली सल्तनत के ममलूक वंश के सुल्तान ग़ियासुद्दीन बलबन द्वारा शुरू किया गया था। उन्होंने सर्वशक्तिमान राजतंत्र को महत्व दिया और सुल्तान की सत्ता को मजबूत करने के लिए कठोर दरबारी शिष्टाचार लागू किए।

questions.question: Zarin Sharma [Darovoala] is famous exponent of which instrument? > ज़रीन शर्मा [दारोवाला] किस वाद्य यंत्र की प्रसिद्ध विशेषज्ञ हैं?
questions.explanation: Zarin Sharma [Daruwalla] was a renowned sarod exponent who made significant contributions to Indian classical music and film orchestras. She was one of the few women to break into the male-dominated world of Indian classical music and Bollywood film orchestras. > ज़रीन शर्मा [दारूवाला] प्रसिद्ध सरोद वादक थीं, जिन्होंने भारतीय शास्त्रीय संगीत और फिल्म ऑर्केस्ट्रा में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान दिया। वह भारतीय शास्त्रीय संगीत और बॉलीवुड फिल्म ऑर्केस्ट्रा के पुरुष-प्रधान क्षेत्र में स्थान बनाने वाली कुछ गिनी-चुनी महिलाओं में से एक थीं।

Had the accident occurred 180 km further it would have been only 3 hrs late. What is the original speed of the train and the total distance of the journey?

questions.question: The US strike on Iran’s nuclear sites on June 20 did not damage the core components of Tehran’s nuclear programme but has only set it _____1_____ by months, according to a US intelligence report prepared by the Pentagon, CNN reported. The report, prepared by the Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA), was based on the assessment carried ____2____ by the US Central Command upon the battle damage in the aftermath of US strikes on three key nuclear facilities of Iran. The report adds that the analysis of the extent of damage and _____3_____ to the sites after US strikes is still ongoing, and could change as more intelligence inputs become available. However, the preliminary report by the Pentagon’s intelligence arm _____4_____ President Donald Trump’s claims that Iran’s nuclear facilities were “completely and totally obliterated” in the US strikes carried out by B-2 stealth bombers. The DIA reports states that the enriched uranium which could be put to use for manufacturing nuclear weapons, may _____5_____ to other secret nuclear sites maintained by Iran. So the (DIA) assessment is that the US set them back maybe a few months, tops,” a person quoted by CNN said. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The phrase "set back" means "to delay or hinder progress" which fits perfectly in this context, implying that the US strike has delayed Iran's nuclear program by a few months. The other options don't fit as well: -"Set aside" means "to ignore or put something to one side" which doesn't fit the context. -"Set down" means "to put something down" or "to write something down" which doesn't fit the context. -"Set up" means "to establish or prepare something" which is the opposite of what the sentence is trying to convey.

The other options don't fit as well: - Supports: Would imply that the report agrees with Trump's claims, which is the opposite of what the sentence is trying to convey. - Backs: Similar to "supports", would imply agreement or endorsement. - Amplifies: Means "to make something louder or stronger" or "to exaggerate" which doesn't fit the context.

questions.question: The US strike on Iran’s nuclear sites on June 20 did not damage the core components of Tehran’s nuclear programme but has only set it _____1_____ by months, according to a US intelligence report prepared by the Pentagon, CNN reported. The report, prepared by the Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA), was based on the assessment carried ____2____ by the US Central Command upon the battle damage in the aftermath of US strikes on three key nuclear facilities of Iran. The report adds that the analysis of the extent of damage and _____3_____ to the sites after US strikes is still ongoing, and could change as more intelligence inputs become available. However, the preliminary report by the Pentagon’s intelligence arm _____4_____ President Donald Trump’s claims that Iran’s nuclear facilities were “completely and totally obliterated” in the US strikes carried out by B-2 stealth bombers. The DIA reports states that the enriched uranium which could be put to use for manufacturing nuclear weapons, may _____5_____ to other secret nuclear sites maintained by Iran. So the (DIA) assessment is that the US set them back maybe a few months, tops,” a person quoted by CNN said. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 5 -
questions.explanation: Explanation - The phrase "may have been moved" implies a possibility that the uranium was relocated in the past, which fits perfectly in this context.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The error lies in segment: are planning a trip to Explanation: • Collective nouns always take singular verbs. • The subject “The team” is a collective noun, which is considered singular in American English usage when acting as a single unit. • Therefore, it requires a singular verb form. • The verb "are planning" is plural, which does not agree with the singular collective noun "team." • The correct verb form should be "is planning" to maintain subject-verb agreement. Corrected Sentence: The team of players is planning a trip to the mountains next week.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. Without training, his musical talent remained ____________.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Latent Explanation: The word "latent" is the correct choice as it means hidden or undeveloped. It fits perfectly in this context, where the sentence is about a natural talent that exists but has not been developed due to lack of training. Here are the meanings and examples of all options: • Latent – छिपा हुआ, सुप्त – Means something present but not yet active or developed. Example: His latent artistic talent surfaced when he began painting. • Latest – नवीनतम – Means most recent or newest. Example: This is the latest version of the software. • Lament – शोक मनाना – Means to express sadness or grief. Example: They lamented the loss of their childhood home. • Lenient – उदार, नरम – Means not strict or harsh in discipline or punishment. Example: The teacher was lenient with late submissions. Final Correct Sentence: Without training, his musical talent remained latent.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. Had he worked harder, he achieve success.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: would have achieved Explanation: • The sentence is a third conditional sentence, used to express a past unreal condition and its probable result. • The correct structure is: Had + subject + past participle [V3], subject + would have + past participle [V3]. • "Achieve" is the base form; the correct past participle is "achieved." • So, “would have achieved” is grammatically correct and fits the structure. Corrected Sentence: Had he worked harder, he would have achieved success.

questions.question: Select the Grammatically correct sentence -
options: You, I and he must attend the meeting.
He, I and you must attend the meeting.
I, you and he must attend the meeting.
You, he and I must attend the meeting.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: You, he and I must attend the meeting. Explanation: • This sentence follows the correct grammatical order when multiple pronouns of different persons appear together. • The standard sequence is 2nd person [you], 3rd person [he/she], and 1st person [I], which is known as the 2–3–1 rule. • This order reflects both politeness and convention in English grammar. • Options [A], [B], and [C] are incorrect because they do not follow this person-order rule. • “You, he and I” is the appropriate sequence when listing multiple subjects of different persons in a sentence.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. The manager decided to step out from his position after ten years of service.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: Step down Explanation: The phrasal verb "step down" means to resign or leave an official position, which correctly fits the context of the sentence where the manager is leaving his role after many years of service. Meanings and examples of the options: • Step down – पद से इस्तीफा देना – To resign from an official position. Example: The CEO decided to step down after the financial scandal. • Step aside – एक ओर हटना – To move so someone else can take your place, often temporary or to allow another to act. Example: He stepped aside to let his colleague handle the issue. • Step off – नीचे उतरना – To get down from something, like a stage or bus. Example: She stepped off the train quickly. • Step out – बाहर जाना – To leave a place briefly or go out. Example: He stepped out for a smoke. Final Correct Sentence: The manager decided to step down from his position after ten years of service.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct. Reema was married ________ Mahesh.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: To Explanation: • The correct preposition used with "married" in passive voice constructions is "to." • "Married to" is used to indicate the person someone is legally joined with in marriage. Examples: • She is married to a doctor. • Rina was married to her childhood friend. Meanings of the other options: • Off – "Married off" is a phrasal verb that means someone [usually parents] arranged someone's marriage, but it does not fit this sentence structure. Example: Her parents married her off at a young age. • With – "Married with" is incorrect. It is a common error in preposition usage. • By – "Married by" refers to the person who performs the marriage ceremony [e.g., a priest or official], not the spouse. Example: They were married by a priest. Corrected Sentence: Reema was married to Mahesh.

questions.question: Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: many hair on Explanation: • The noun "hair" is uncountable when referring to hair in general [e.g., hair on someone’s head]. • We do not use "many" with uncountable nouns. Instead, we use "much." • "Many hair" is grammatically incorrect. The correct usage is "much hair." Examples: • He doesn't have much hair left. ✔ • He has many hair. ❌ Corrected Sentence: He does not have much hair on his head anymore.

questions.question: Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph: A. time is one of the most precious resources we have B. and respect time is so important in every stage of life C. which is why learning to manage D. once it is gone, we can never get it back
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: ADCB Explanation: Let’s break it down step by step: • Sentence A starts the paragraph by introducing the idea that time is a precious resource. • Sentence D follows smoothly, adding that once time is gone, it can never be regained — emphasizing its value. • Sentence C then explains why managing time is important, linking back to the loss mentioned in D. • Sentence B concludes by stating that respecting time is important at every stage of life, wrapping up the paragraph meaningfully. Final Paragraph: Time is one of the most precious resources we have, and once it is gone, we can never get it back, which is why learning to manage and respect time is so important in every stage of life.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of the given sentence. Who will lead the team in the competition?
options: By whom will the team be led in the competition?
Who will the team be led by in the competition?
Whom will lead the team in the competition?
The team will be led by who in the competition?
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: By whom will the team be led in the competition? Explanation: • The original sentence is a future tense question with "Who" as the subject. • When converting to passive voice, the subject "Who" changes to the object form "whom" because the focus shifts to the person receiving the action. • The correct passive structure for future tense questions is: By whom + will + subject + be + past participle. • Option [A] correctly follows this structure by placing "by whom" at the beginning, followed by "will the team be led," which is the passive form of "will lead." • The rest of the sentence, "in the competition," remains unchanged as it describes the context of the action. Corrected Sentence: By whom will the team be led in the competition?

questions.question: Change the narration of the given sentence. The mother said to her son, "Don't play outside after dark."
options: The mother told her son not to play outside after dark.
The mother said her son don't play outside after dark.
The mother advised her son that he should not play outside after dark.
The mother told her son that he does not play outside after dark.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: The mother told her son not to play outside after dark. Explanation: • Subject + told + object + not to + base verb + rest of the sentence. • The reporting verb "told" is used for giving commands or instructions in reported speech. • In indirect speech, negative imperatives are changed into "not to" + base form of the verb. • "Don't play" becomes "not to play" in reported speech. • The pronoun "her son" remains the same as the subject of the reported speech. • Options [B], [C], and [D] contain errors in verb forms, sentence structure, or incorrect reporting verbs. Final Sentence: The mother told her son not to play outside after dark.
